experience.title: Three Js
experience.subtitle: Three.js is a JavaScript library that simplifies working with WebGL, providing tools for creating and rendering interactive 3D graphics in the browser. It offers abstractions for geometries, materials, lighting, cameras, shaders, animations, and scene management, enabling developers to build complex visual experiences with far less boilerplate. Its robust ecosystem, performance-oriented architecture, and wide feature set make it a leading solution for real-time 3D on the web.
